data.description: In the latest report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country rose to 6.2% in July, marking an increase of 0.3% from the previous month. This translates to a total of 10.2 million individuals currently without jobs. The report also highlighted a decrease in job vacancies by 2.1% compared to the previous quarter. Additionally, the labor force participation rate saw a slight decrease to 62.5%. These numbers underscore the ongoing challenges faced by the labor market amidst the current economic conditions.

data.title: NASA shifts Artemis Program focus, planning to construct a permanent lunar base in three phases for Mars mission prep.
data.description: An organization has proposed a plan consisting of three phases to establish infrastructure on the moon. The initiative is aimed at testing technologies and systems for future missions to Mars, demonstrating a step-by-step approach towards more ambitious space endeavors.

data.title: AIxCrypto Holdings Reports Full Year 2025 Financial Results; Highlights Transformational Pivot to AI and Blockchain Infrastructure
data.description: As of March 24, 2026, AIxCrypto Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: AIXC) unveiled its financial outcomes for the fiscal year ending on December 31, 2025. This disclosure marked the company's first annual earnings report since transitioning from a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical entity.

data.title: Apogee Therapeutics, Inc. Announces Pricing of $350 Million Underwritten Public Offering
data.description: In a press release dated March 24, 2026, Apogee Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: APGE), headquartered in San Francisco and Boston, disclosed the details of its underwritten public offering. The company is a clinical-stage biotechnology firm specializing in enhanced biologics for inflammatory and immunology markets. They revealed the pricing of 5,000,000 shares of common stock at $70.00 per share, expecting to generate about $350 million in aggregate gross proceeds, excluding underwriting fees and additional expenses. The offering, set to be finalized on March 26, 2026, awaits standard closing conditions. Furthermore, Apogee granted underwriters a 30-day option to acquire up to 750,000 extra shares at the same public offering price, with deductions for discounts and commissions.

data.title: Analysis reveals technical indicators serve as market state evaluation tools. Moving averages categorized into skim, touch, and intertwine interactions. Systematic framework defined for trend analysis. (Read More)
data.description: In speculative markets, technical analysis has often been misunderstood. Some view it as a predictive tool, while others discredit it as unscientific. Both perspectives overlook the primary purpose of technical analysis. This analysis reveals that technical indicators essentially serve as a comprehensive classification tool for market conditions. By focusing on the moving average system, a three-tier classification of moving average interactions—skim, touch, and intertwine—is established. These interactions are linked to trend continuation and reversal, offering a systematic approach for detailed micro-level analysis.

data.title: OpenAI secures $110B in funding from Amazon, NVIDIA, SoftBank, now valued at $730B. Historic investment.
data.description: OpenAI has recently closed a monumental funding round, raising a total of $110 billion. The funding came from major backers, with $50 billion contributed by Amazon, and $30 billion each from NVIDIA and SoftBank. This injection of capital has propelled OpenAI to a pre-money valuation of $730 billion, marking a significant milestone for the company.
